L1_headline: + SEM – Katherine R Davisson acquired restricted stock grant. | 07/29/25
L2_brief: Director Katherine R Davisson received a grant of 14,035 restricted shares of Select Medical Holdings on July 29, 2025, at $0 cost as part of director compensation. The shares vest on July 29, 2026, bringing her total direct holdings to 60,035 shares. This is a routine equity compensation award rather than an open-market purchase.

L3_detailed.pattern_notes: Standard annual director equity compensation grant. Restricted stock vests in one year (July 29, 2026). This represents approximately 23% of her post-transaction holdings, indicating a meaningful portion of her ownership is in unvested restricted stock.
risks_flagged: Not an open-market purchase - compensation grant with no cash outlay
Shares subject to one-year vesting cliff
